creator: dougs@dawnsign.com
text:
(In reply to Loïc Bartoletti from comment #1)

Yes, 'portmaster -aD' is what I ran.

I ended up downloading the file manually from the first site listed in the portmaster run and renaming it to Oslandia-SFCGAL-2d6a1a89552f14fe2926038b7237686bb9e5472e_GL0.tar.gz. I was then able to run portmaster as there now was a file waiting in the /usr/ports/distfiles directory. I see what appears to be an attempt to rename the file within the URL (?dummy). Is that so?

The second site (https://distcache/FreeBSD.org) apparently doesn't contain the needed file.
